title: Congratulations Chocolate Gift Box - Celebration Assortment for Achievements, Chocolate Hamper Selection Box, Gift for Him and for Her - 7 Unique Bars
features: A PREMIUM SELECTION: Enjoy seven full-size chocolate bars, each chosen for its own unique taste and texture. From silky smooth melts to crunchy, nutty bites, this box has something for every chocolate mood

BEAUTIFULLY PACKAGED: The chocolates arrive in a sturdy, elegant gift box that needs no extra wrapping. Your gift stays safe and neat in transit, with a spot for your personal message to make it even more special
MADE FOR ANY OCCASION: Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, thank-yous, or get-well wishes. With its wide appeal, this gift works for anyone who loves chocolate and always feels thoughtful
SOMETHING FOR EVERYONE: With a mix of flavours and textures, there’s a treat for every taste. The generous 318-gram box is big enough to share, yet perfect for one person to enjoy over time
FRESH AND TRUSTWORTHY: Each bar is sealed to keep the flavour fresh. We focus on quality and responsible sourcing, so you can feel good about giving this gift anytime
description: Product Description Perfect Chocolate Gift Box – Let's Make Your Moments Special Why Choose Our Chocolate Gift Box? Handwritten notes & 14 curated occasions make gifting effortless and unforgettable. Can I include a personal message? Yes! Add your gift note during checkout – you can also select gift option to have gift packing from amazon. How fast is UK delivery? Arrives in prime 1 day delivery nationwide for last-minute occasions. Is the packaging presentation-ready? Absolutely – our luxury gift boxes will arrive pristine.

specifications_table.Specialty: Creamy melt, Flaky texture, Silky filling, Hazelnut crunch, Fluffy nougat, Crunchy caramel, Protein-packed
